notes: JUSTICE visitors. SCAFFOLD — three visitors with the canonical waiter sequence; per-visitor step flavor is placeholder.

visitors.name: Anna at the Plaintiff Table
visitors.lore_text: You see Anna at the Plaintiff Table. (JUSTICE beat — refine.)
pre_arrival_hints: You sense anna at the plaintiff table is near.
Steps. Or breath. Or the room shifting.

steps.greet: You meet eyes with Anna at the Plaintiff Table. The room registers it.
steps.listen: Anna at the Plaintiff Table tells you what they came to tell you.
steps.deliver: You give Anna at the Plaintiff Table what they were after.
steps.sit_with: Anna at the Plaintiff Table stays for a beat. You stay back.
